caption: An abstract animation unfolds against a glowing, teal-to-white gradient background. A thin, vertical dark line initially appears in the center of the upper left area. As the sequence progresses, this line transforms into a dark, semicircular shape that curves towards the right. In the subsequent stages, the shape evolves into a complex, layered three-dimensional object. This object consists of a dark teal semicircle serving as a base, from which several thin, light-green rectangular slats of varying heights rise vertically, resembling a stylized bar chart or architectural structure. The object rotates slightly and shifts its perspective, revealing its depth and a smooth, reflective surface on the interior of the semicircular shell. No people, text, or logos are present in the scene.
